name: stephanie@dscc.org
subject: Here's how many senators we need (health care)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Here's the math you need to know to fight back on the GOP's disastrous health care repeal bill.
---
[****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170507-Nielsen-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Team,

House Republicans rammed through Thursday's Obamacare repeal vote without even waiting for an estimate of how much the bill would cost.

But despite the rushed approach, there are a few numbers we do know:
* **1 in 4:** that's how many Americans have pre-existing conditions and could be charged more under the GOP plan
* **5 times:** that's how much premiums could increase for older Americans
* **24 million:** the number of Americans expected to lose their health insurance entirely if the GOP plan passes
* **51:** The number of senators who need to vote against Trumpcare.

[**And here's a number you can impact -- the amount we put into our ad buy and other efforts to pressure Republicans to stop this disastrous bill. Chip in $1 now to help fund our ads and sway Republicans not to repeal Obamacare.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170507-Nielsen-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Democrats are standing united in opposition to this terrible bill, which means that we just need to show every GOP senator what's at stake.

Our best chance to kill this bill is to show Republicans the price they'll pay for ripping health care coverage away from their constituents. That's why we're running ads right now targeting vulnerable Republicans over the GOP plan.

[**Chip in $1 to help fund our ads and show Republicans we 're ready to hold them accountable if they repeal Obamacare.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170507-Nielsen-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thank you,

Stephanie Nielsen
DSCC Research Director

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Tom Perez
subject: re: outspent five-to-one
body:
Help elect Rob Quist in Montana.
---
**Split a donation between Rob Quist and the DNC to help elect Rob to Congress and Democrats around the country.
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf86/4067b0a/2fd8272dd/7e776959/788747010/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Rob-Quist-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170508_tp_v2s2&source=em_20170508_tp_v2s2&refcode=em_20170508_tp_v2s2")****
Friend --

On May 25th, Montanans will go to the polls to elect their member of Congress. We have a huge opportunity to elect a Democrat who will fight for Montana families and be an independent voice to keep Donald Trump in check instead of rubber-stamping his agenda.

So we have to spend every day between now and then getting the word out about Rob Quist -- but that's not going to be easy, because Rob is in danger of being wildly outspent by the GOP.

**[I'm asking you to help close the gap. Pitch in $10 or more to help us win in Montana and elect more Democrats across the country -- we'll split your donation between Rob Quist's campaign and the DNC.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf86/4067b0a/2fd8272dd/7e776966/788747010/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/Rob-Quist-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Im+asking+you+to+help+close+the+gapCUSTO&utm_campaign=em_20170508_tp_v2s2&source=em_20170508_tp_v2s2&refcode=em_20170508_tp_v2s2")**

Rob Quist's Republican opponent is relying on big donors and special interests to put him over the top. One Republican Super PAC has already invested $2 million in this race to attack Rob. Taken all together, the GOP is on pace to outspend Rob five-to-one on TV ads in the final two weeks of this election.

We can't let that happen. We have to make sure every Montana voter gets the facts about Rob's record and what's at stake in this election -- instead of the GOP's attack ads and lies.

It's time to pull out all the stops to help Democrats fight back. Split a $10 donation between Rob Quist and the DNC today.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be divided evenly between the DNC and Rob Quist for Montana.

[ QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf86/4067b0a/2fd8272dd/7e776967/788747010/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-quist?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170508_tp_v2s2&source=em_20170508_tp_v2s2&refcode=em_20170508_tp_v2s2")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf86/4067b0a/2fd8272dd/7e776964/788747010/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-quist?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170508_tp_v2s2&source=em_20170508_tp_v2s2&refcode=em_20170508_tp_v2s2")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf86/4067b0a/2fd8272dd/7e776965/788747010/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-quist?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170508_tp_v2s2&source=em_20170508_tp_v2s2&refcode=em_20170508_tp_v2s2")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf86/4067b0a/2fd8272dd/7e776962/788747010/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-quist?express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170508_tp_v2s2&source=em_20170508_tp_v2s2&refcode=em_20170508_tp_v2s2")
[QUICK DONATE: $200](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf86/4067b0a/2fd8272dd/7e776963/788747010/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-quist?express_lane=true&amount=200&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+QUICK+DONATE+200&utm_campaign=em_20170508_tp_v2s2&source=em_20170508_tp_v2s2&refcode=em_20170508_tp_v2s2")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf86/4067b0a/2fd8272dd/7e776960/788747010/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/Rob-Quist-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170508_tp_v2s2&source=em_20170508_tp_v2s2&refcode=em_20170508_tp_v2s2")
** This is such an important race, and it's how we'll take back our majority in Congress -- one seat at a time. Thanks for leaving it all on the field.

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf86/4067b0a/2fd8272dd/7e77696e/788747010/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170508_tp_v2s2&source=em_20170508_tp_v2s2&refcode=em_20170508_tp_v2s2"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf86/4067b0a/2fd8272dd/7e77696f/788747010/VEsHBA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170508_tp_v2s2&source=em_20170508_tp_v2s2&refcode=em_20170508_tp_v2s2") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf86/4067b0a/2fd8272dd/7e77696c/788747010/VEsHBw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170508_tp_v2s2&source=em_20170508_tp_v2s2&refcode=em_20170508_tp_v2s2"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

| Dear Peter,
The June 13th Republican primary is just 36 days away and our campaign is ready to finish strong and win by sharing a positive, conservative vision for Virginia.
Today we are launching our [first television ad](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001b1dc13c1TOKRVFJxmTnnrIOGpgHYT5RxPkPmJxHxPtQVRbN1O3H9UU95ZUoN_4DwKMwQV4kvr_icGYInpIc5XaYfaJmrqeUzfauGZW0avcRHtHOyslL9l2cjDK-Qfw0mAjSexsFN9FlyXugXXhghj24wZgS810SFsRcrTceUlJK7UF3OTBjkHgO4D0ADqT8XckIt8KoExGkKYjB9N58h-sL7hnDgLazd2igWoi1TnEGA-aANQry2Vgk1DIZ0fU5Pd9HcVDD2YtM=&c=RO3lUv2iuFZ58NrWB2UT5vg0bVX61MyYb0848tc48OVp-Ei3qBGgow==&ch=yet2VAOXtIxcZfJAjvhexsp4dlYF4Fx_M8zVFEEZHUc07Rus2USAzw==), entitled "[Getting Things Done](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001b1dc13c1TOKRVFJxmTnnrIOGpgHYT5RxPkPmJxHxPtQVRbN1O3H9UU95ZUoN_4DwKMwQV4kvr_icGYInpIc5XaYfaJmrqeUzfauGZW0avcRHtHOyslL9l2cjDK-Qfw0mAjSexsFN9FlyXugXXhghj24wZgS810SFsRcrTceUlJK7UF3OTBjkHgO4D0ADqT8XckIt8KoExGkKYjB9N58h-sL7hnDgLazd2igWoi1TnEGA-aANQry2Vgk1DIZ0fU5Pd9HcVDD2YtM=&c=RO3lUv2iuFZ58NrWB2UT5vg0bVX61MyYb0848tc48OVp-Ei3qBGgow==&ch=yet2VAOXtIxcZfJAjvhexsp4dlYF4Fx_M8zVFEEZHUc07Rus2USAzw==)."
As a mom, an ethics attorney, and a state senator, I know how to balance competing demands while advancing a conservative vision for Virginia's future.
I am proud of my record defending conservative groups against IRS targeting, leading the fight against Obamacare's mandate in Virginia, and pushing back against the regulatory overreach and high taxes which stand in the way of economic growth.
I believe Virginia's best days are still ahead of us, if we can put principle before party and do what is right for real people who are ready for a return to economic growth and increased freedom in their personal lives. That is why I have consistently stood up for free enterprise and worked to strengthen ethics in government by calling for a complete ban on gifts to politicians from lobbyists and special interests.
Please watch our ad below and consider contributing [$500, $250, or even $100](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001b1dc13c1TOKRVFJxmTnnrIOGpgHYT5RxPkPmJxHxPtQVRbN1O3H9UU95ZUoN_4DweJfoseKrToNauDq1bIk71vGzOs3H4WgWgofKrfMd-V4Sg_micNQFPxRkiefHpIL7lBwdGigVV10nP4f5i3IMhcnKX6M55QFeeR67cFG2Dd2NpPE_axH5lyPd8413RqCgsV40GfWpr_Jy5f1zMIwoqRGh6bZFT3QQNe-6GbV-RKYjneOs-lCYDA==&c=RO3lUv2iuFZ58NrWB2UT5vg0bVX61MyYb0848tc48OVp-Ei3qBGgow==&ch=yet2VAOXtIxcZfJAjvhexsp4dlYF4Fx_M8zVFEEZHUc07Rus2USAzw==) to help keep this ad up on TV and share our positive, conservative message across Virginia.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
subject: Stop the craven Trumpcare bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
I will fight this morally and fiscally bankrupt bill in the Senate every step of the way. Stand with me to make your voice heard.
---
[****](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e772/2b07114c/529155c4/736e8e49/1658389285/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/protect-our-care?source=PT-20170508-Booker-ProsHV")
Team,

The craven Republican health care repeal bill is an injustice for the millions of Americans who deserve more from the wealthiest nation on Earth.

Health care must be a right -- it makes moral sense and economic sense. The struggle for better healthcare is the moral urgency facing America today.

[**Stand with me to denounce the Republican health care repeal plan and urge Republicans to stop this disastrous bill from becoming law.**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e772/2b07114c/529155c4/736e8e49/1658389285/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/protect-our-care?source=PT-20170508-Booker-ProsHV")

The House of Representatives rushed through a repeal of Obamacare without public debate or a full understanding of its devastating consequences. Unfortunately, independent experts tell us that millions will lose access to health insurance and the cost of coverage for many will go up under this bill -- all to give the wealthiest Americans a huge tax cut. Now it's up to the Senate to stop this bill in its tracks.

No family should go bankrupt because a loved one has cancer. No senior should have to decide between buying their prescription drugs or paying for groceries. No woman should have to travel hundreds of miles to access essential reproductive health services.

The GOP bill is cruel, it's wrong, and it will cost lives.

I will fight this morally and fiscally bankrupt bill in the Senate every step of the way, and we must stand together to make our voices heard.

**Add your name now -- tell Republicans not to play politics with people 's health care:

[http://dscc.org/stop-this-craven-bill](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e772/2b07114c/529155c4/736e8e49/1658389285/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/protect-our-care?source=PT-20170508-Booker-ProsHV")**

Thanks,

Senator Cory Booker

**A note on your support, friend:**

Senate Democrats are the last line of defense against Trumpcare and the DSCC is standing with Democratic senators in the fight against this bill.

With 99% of the DSCC's contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, the DSCC is counting on you.

Please consider making a contribution of any amount today.

120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e772/2b07114c/529155c4/736e8e4a/1658389285/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. Friends, When we worked to elect Roy Cooper as our governor, we knew this moment would come. We knew there would be a time that, as governor, he would be our last line of defense. After Republicans in the House voted last week to take health care away from more than 24 million Americans, Governor Cooper vowed to fight for our health care. But he needs our help in that fight. **[Governor Cooper is urging our two U.S. senators to stand up and vote "no" on Donald Trump's health care plan. Add your name to support Roy here.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202f53/2fde7c66/43e44389/15690187/3570726030/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/stand-with-roy-and-fight-for-healthcare?utm_campaign=em17_170508_health2_adv_gq_ful__ch&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em17_170508_health2_adv_gq_ful__ch&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")** Under the House Republican plan, many people would lose their health coverage, costs for seniors would go up, and people with pre-existing conditions would no longer be protected. Now it's up to the Senate to decide the fate of our health care. Roy needs you to stand with him and fight for healthcare in North Carolina. **[Add your name here to tell your senators to vote no on House Republicans' health care bill.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202f53/2fde7c66/43e44389/15690187/3570726030/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/stand-with-roy-and-fight-for-healthcare?utm_campaign=em17_170508_health2_adv_gq_ful__ch&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em17_170508_health2_adv_gq_ful__ch&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")** Thanks for your support, Caroline Hall,

body:
| |

| |

| It is 2017. **Women 's rights are human rights.** Women are entitled to affordable, accessible health care, including reproductive care.

But Republicans and Trump won't stop trying to take it away.

Trump just signed a rule allowing states to reject Title X funding from health clinics like Planned Parenthood that provide women with essential services.

Without these centers and providers, the rate of unintended pregnancy would balloon by 33 percent; the teen pregnancy rate would be 30 percent higher; 2,000 cases of cervical cancer would go undetected; 6 million STI tests would go undone, and there would be 87,000 more preterm or low birth weight births due to lack of prenatal care.

If the states reject Title X funding, Trump and the GOP have effectively left up to four million women without basic care just so they could score political points.

I'm not going to mince words: **this was an attack on women 's health.**

_**[Sign this petition and tell Republicans that women deserve access to reproductive health services.](http://fl.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e94/622b7b5b/2a2801a/307bcc93/3660917214/VEsH/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/Title-X-funding/?code=DWS&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fcontribute%2Fpage%2Fdwse170503%3Frecurring%3Dtrue")**_

What they did was shameful.

[_**Join me and let 's hold them accountable.**_](http://fl.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e94/622b7b5b/2a2801a/307bcc93/3660917214/VEsE/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/Title-X-funding/?code=DWS&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fcontribute%2Fpage%2Fdwse170503%3Frecurring%3Dtrue")

Thank you,

Debbie |

body:
Peter,
We wanted to pass along this important article. Please share it with your friends.

\- Team Greitens

**Missouri Gov. Eric Greitens Fighting to Stop St. Louis From Becoming a "Sanctuary City for Abortion"**
By: [LifeNews.com](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=53b120d181&e=84041254e6)

That the St. Louis Board of Aldermen [passed an ordinance declaring St. Louis a "sanctuary city" for abortion](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=5b99ef6db6&e=84041254e6) is outrageous.
That the Missouri Senate has ground to a halt and can't get legislation to move - including a state solution to stop St. Louis - is frightening.
Politics as usual has devolved into Republicans filibustering other Republican measures on their own Senate floor. Pro-life legislation is left waiting.
All predictions have the Missouri Senate not likely to get much legislation through before its May 12th deadline. Governor Greitens needs a budget and has said he will call as many special sessions as necessary to get that done. But he also won't let the legislature off the hook until a solution is passed to fix the so-called anti-discrimination 'sanctuary city for abortion' problem out of St. Louis.
Missouri was a ground zero state in the 2016 gubernatorial elections, and Greitens, a newcomer to politics, won the Governor's race with a strong commitment to pro-life initiatives. **He 's ready to deliver**...only to have the Missouri Senate devolve into inactivity. His budget would defund Planned Parenthood and provide $6 million for alternatives to abortion centers.
...
The idea of St. Louis as a 'sanctuary city' for abortion - or any other copycat city in America - is chilling. **It would be a nightmare if the gridlock in the Missouri Senate would ultimately allow St. Louis ' discriminatory actions to stand, or to turn a blind eye to the pain of abortion in the womb or trafficking in the lives of unwanted babies, in the name of politics as usual.**
The Missouri Senate needs to understand the gravity of its responsibilities and **give Governor Greitens the tools he needs to protect women and babies** and combat discriminatory attacks on pro-life businesses in St. Louis.

Full article here: [http://www.lifenews.com/2017/04/28/missouri-gov-eric-greitens-fighting-to-stop-st-louis-from-becoming-a-sanctuary-city-for-abortion/](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=e9db7a4040&e=84041254e6)

Paid for by Greitens for Missouri
